site.title: Dollar Nong | Photographer
site.about_text1: I am Dollar Nong, a professional photographer based in Asia, specializing in portrait, event, and food photography. With over a decade of experience, I believe every image tells a story worth preserving.
site.about_text2: My work spans across cultures and continents — from intimate portrait sessions to large-scale event coverage, from fine dining culinary photography to street food documentaries. Every frame is crafted with precision, passion, and an eye for the extraordinary in the ordinary.
site.contact_desc: Available for commissions, collaborations, and assignments worldwide. Reach out to discuss your project.
site.upload_hint: Drag & drop or click to upload images. Supported: JPG, PNG, WebP
site.admin_login_hint: Enter your credentials to access the dashboard
site.admin_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this image?
site.no_images: No images yet. Upload your first photo!

categories.portrait_desc: Portrait photography — individuals, families, personal branding
categories.event_desc: Event photography — concerts, corporate events, celebrations
categories.food_desc: Food photography — restaurant menus, culinary arts, still life

site.title: Dollar Nong | 摄影师
site.hero_subtitle: 摄影师 · 视觉叙事者
site.about_text1: 我是 Dollar Nong，一名常驻亚洲的专业摄影师，专注于人像、演出和美食摄影。拥有超过十年经验，我相信每一张图像都承载着值得珍藏的故事。
site.about_text2: 我的作品横跨文化与大陆——从亲密的个人肖像到大型活动记录，从高级餐饮美食摄影到街头美食纪实。每一帧都以精准、热情和发现平凡中的非凡之眼精心雕琢。
site.contact_desc: 接受全球范围内的委托拍摄、合作与项目委托。欢迎联系讨论您的项目。
site.copyright: © 2026 Dollar Nong. 保留所有权利。

categories.portrait_desc: 人像摄影 — 个人、家庭、个人品牌
categories.event_desc: 演出摄影 — 音乐会、企业活动、庆典
categories.food_desc: 美食摄影 — 餐厅菜单、烹饪艺术、静物
